description_long: This house features a two-story central section flanked by single-story wings, all topped with hipped roofs. The exterior is clad in light-colored siding with dark trim around the windows and roof edges, giving it a classic, understated appearance. The front facade is symmetrical, with a prominent covered entryway supported by columns and a small porch, as well as a decorative balcony above the entrance. Multiple rectangular windows are evenly spaced along the walls, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rooflines are clean and simple, with the central section rising above the wings to create a sense of verticality. Subtle architectural details, such as the overhanging eaves and window framing, add to the house's traditional charm.
description: A traditional two-story house with hipped roofs, symmetrical wings, and a prominent columned entryway. Light siding, dark trim, and evenly spaced windows define its classic appearance.
description_view_0: The side view shows the two-story central section and one of the single-story wings, with visible windows and the overhanging roof.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the main entryway with columns, a porch, and a decorative balcony, as well as the symmetrical arrangement of windows and wings.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors view 0, showing the two-story central section and the other single-story wing, with similar window placement.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the back of the house, featuring a simpler facade with multiple windows and the central section rising above the wings.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered entryway with columns, steps, a small porch, and a decorative balcony above
